summary: International user plain ESPN archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND a regular season game is archived with ESPN broadcaster
AND the game is not ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archived ESPN game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
